arts.ttl: Liverpool transfer news: Reds suffer Khvicha Kvaratskhelia transfer blow?
arts.sum: Liverpool are one of a number of top European clubs who appear to have suffered a blow in their pursuit of Napoli winger Khvicha Kvaratskhelia.

arts.ttl: Serie A Preview: Juventus vs Napoli – Team News, Line-ups & Prediction
arts.sum: One of the most heavily anticipated fixtures in the Serie A calendar pits Juventus and Napoli against each other at the Allianz Stadium. Saturday is a special occasion for the Turin faithful as their former player and manager, Antonio Conte, rolls into town as a foe.
